description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a boxy, geometric design. The facade features large rectangular windows, providing ample natural light to the interior spaces. The front includes a double garage with two cars parked, a small landscaped garden, and a paved driveway. The rear of the house opens to a patio area with outdoor seating and is bordered by trees and greenery. The exterior walls are primarily gray with green accent panels, and the interior is visible through the expansive windows, revealing open-plan living and dining areas. The house is surrounded by a narrow strip of grass, and the overall design emphasizes clean lines and functional urban living.
description: A modern, boxy two-story house with large windows, a double garage, and a flat roof, featuring gray and green exterior accents and open-plan interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, main entrance, landscaped garden, and large windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, flat facade, green accent panels, and a row of windows along the upper floor.
description_view_2: Rear view with a patio area, outdoor seating, and trees, as well as large windows and green wall accents.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more windows, a side entrance, and the open-plan interior layout.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple modern door adjacent to the double garage, with a small landscaped area and paved approach, no porch or overhang.
